tools_used: official Supreme Court docket PDF retrieval
helpful: The docket snapshot exposed the CVSG and conference timing signals.
The committed statpack supplied calibrated cert, paid-petition, and CVSG base rates.
The official docket links allowed retrieval of the dispositive SG recommendation.
gaps: Provision the Solicitor General's CVSG brief and post-CVSG supplemental brief as filed-document text when they are present on the snapshot docket.
notes: The CourtListener searches did not locate the lower-court St. Mary opinion, but the SG brief stated the granted questions and the overlap needed for this forecast.
